headline: South Florida Tech Week: MDC's AI Hub Opens, Dark Watch Raises $3.5M, EducUp Hits Profitability

stories.title: MDC Opens 7,000 Sq Ft AI Innovation Hub in Miami
stories.summary: Miami Dade College unveiled its third AI Innovation Hub at Kendall Campus with specialized labs for cognitive apps, robotics, cybersecurity & metaverse tech. The college has already trained 4,000+ students in AI through partnerships w/ Intel, Google, Microsoft & IBM.
stories.takeaway: Miami's getting serious abt AI workforce development—MDC's expanding from one hub to a whole ecosystem w/ real industry partnerships built in. Lowkey positioning South Florida as an AI talent pipeline.

stories.title: Dark Watch Closes Oversubscribed $3.5M Seed Round for Hospitality Security
stories.summary: Stuart-based startup Dark Watch secured $3.5M to scale its AI-powered threat intelligence platform that detects high-risk individuals before hotel check-in. Round led by Eagle Venture Fund w/ Blu Ventures & His Kingdom Resources in tow.
stories.takeaway: Fr, this is lowkey genius—embedding real-time threat detection into existing booking/payment systems instead of adding new layers. Hotels get safety without disrupting guest experience.

stories.title: EducUp Hits Profitability, Scales Licensing Education to 30+ States
stories.summary: Miami edtech company EducUp crossed profitability while expanding professional licensing education from Florida across Texas, California & beyond. Now serves thousands of insurance agents, adjusters & service reps through required continuing ed programs.
stories.takeaway: Tbh, there's fr money in boring stuff—boring regulated industry, boring licensing reqs, but EducUp found a path to profitable growth by solving a real compliance pain point for professionals.

stories.title: Sivotec Uses Genetics + AI to Diagnose Rare Diseases in Seconds
stories.summary: Boca Raton startup Sivotec is cutting rare disease diagnosis time from days to 10 seconds by combining genetic databases w/ AI. Has run 162k+ tests across 40 countries & works w/ Johns Hopkins & NIH databases to keep improving accuracy.
stories.takeaway: This is literally transforming pediatric diagnostics—machine learning gets smarter w/ every case. Sivotec's already sitting on data from 11k autism cases to find patterns no one's noticed before.

watchNext.title: How Miami Became a Launchpad for Cross-Border Payment Startups
watchNext.why: Miami's geographic advantage + Latin America proximity = fintech gold. Perfect setup for founders rethinking how payments move across borders. Could be the next wave of unicorns.

watchNext.title: Propy Acquires Boss Law Title Division for Multi-Million Dollar Deal
watchNext.why: Miami real estate AI platform just acquired a title company—vertical integration fr. Shows how AI isn't just disrupting—it's consolidating whole supply chains. Worth watching how this scales.
